title: 第 78 節
en: Parsva, name of the twenty-third Tirthakara, 194, 271.
Paurushi, wake of the day or night, Paushya, name of a month, 273.
Phalgumitra, name of a Sthavira, Plants, endowed with intellect, ro. Players and other performers, 253. Policemen, 252.
Prabhasa, name of a Ganadhara, 286. Prabhava, name of a Sthavira, 287. Pradina, name of a gotra, 287, 288. Prázata Kalpa, 271. Prasnavahanaka, name of a Kula, Pratyekabuddha, 66 n r.
Pundravardhaniya, name of a Sakha, Punyabhadra, 289.
Pürzapattrikà, name of a Sakha, Párva, 274, 278, 284.
Pushpadanta, name of the ninth Tirthakara, 280.
Pushpottara, name of a Vimána, I90, 218.
